prompt: Create a realistic documentary-style wide-angle photograph inside Suzhoujie Station on Beijing Subway Line 10 during early evening rush hour, with a cool fluorescent indoor lighting mood and a sense of calm certainty contrasted with traffic chaos outside. The camera is at platform level, horizontal 16:9 composition, looking down a clean modern metro platform with glossy gray tile floor, white columns, ribbed metal ceiling, and glass platform screen doors on the right. In the center foreground, show one main traveler: an adult man in a dark blue winter jacket, jeans, black boots, scarf, and backpack, standing upright near the yellow safety line, checking his wristwatch while holding the handle of a brown rolling suitcase; he also holds a small transit card or ticket in one hand. His face should be intentionally blurred or anonymized. Behind him, include exactly 13 other visible commuters spread across the platform and corridor, some walking toward camera, some waiting by the doors, all dressed in winter coats with indistinct or blurred faces. On the right, behind the glass doors, show a blue subway train stopped at the platform with its headlights visible. Through the glass and station opening beyond the train, show an elevated expressway packed with dense red brake lights and slow-moving cars, creating a vivid contrast between predictable subway travel and gridlocked road traffic. Include exactly 3 prominent information/signage elements: 1 overhead black wayfinding sign on the left with arrows and bilingual text for Line 10, Way Out, Sushuguo Station, and To Wanshouji; 1 overhead digital train-arrival board near the top center showing the time 18:15 and text like “Next Train: Line 10 (Inner Loop) Arriving in 1 minute”; 1 long platform wall sign above the train doors on the right with Chinese and English station/direction text including “Suzhoujie Station,” “Suzhoujie Direction,” “Line 10,” and “To Wanshouji.” Use natural reflections on the polished floor and glass, slightly muted green-blue cinematic color grading, realistic lens perspective, high detail, no cartoon style, no extra logos, no watermark.
